parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, data: null, error: 'Unauthorized' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: { topic_id: $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.body.topic_id, message: 'Assembly workflow started' }, error: null }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'assembling', assembly_status: 'in_progress', last_status_change: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Load Topic').item.json[0]?.project_id || $('Load All Scenes').item.json[0]?.project_id, topic_id: $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.body.topic_id, stage: 'assembly', action: 'started', details: { total_scenes: $('Load All Scenes').item.json.length } }) }}

parameters.command: =mkdir -p /tmp/production/{{ $json.topic_id }}/clips /tmp/production/{{ $json.topic_id }}/captions /tmp/production/{{ $json.topic_id }}/final /tmp/production/{{ $json.topic_id }}/audio /tmp/production/{{ $json.topic_id }}/images /tmp/production/{{ $json.topic_id }}/video_clips && echo '{{ $json.srt_content.replace(/'/g, "'\''") }}' > '/tmp/production/{{ $json.topic_id }}/captions/{{ $json.topic_title }}.srt' && echo 'Directories created and SRT written'

=ffmpeg -y -i /tmp/production/{{ $('Generate Concat List').item.json.topic_id }}/raw_final.mp4 -af "loudnorm=I=-16:TP=-1.5:LRA=11" -c:v copy -movflags +faststart "/tmp/production/{{ $('Generate Concat List').item.json.topic_id }}/final/{{ $('Generate Concat List').item.json.topic_title }}.mp4" 2>&1 && echo 'NORMALIZE_SUCCESS' || echo 'NORMALIZE_FAILED'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'assembled', assembly_status: 'complete', drive_video_url: $('Upload Video to Drive').item.json?.webViewLink || $('Upload Video to Drive').item.json?.id || 'uploaded', last_status_change: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Generate Concat List').item.json.project_id, topic_id: $('Generate Concat List').item.json.topic_id, stage: 'assembly', action: 'completed', details: { scene_count: $('Generate Concat List').item.json.total_scenes, clips_in_concat: $('Generate Concat List').item.json.clips_in_concat, skipped_count: $('Generate Concat List').item.json.skipped_count } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'failed', assembly_status: 'failed', error_log: 'Concat failed: ' + ($json.stderr || $json.stdout || 'Unknown error'), last_status_change: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Generate Concat List').item.json.project_id, topic_id: $('Generate Concat List').item.json.topic_id, stage: 'assembly', action: 'failed', details: { step: 'concat', error: $json.stderr || $json.stdout || 'Unknown' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'failed', assembly_status: 'failed', error_log: 'Normalization failed: ' + ($json.stderr || $json.stdout || 'Unknown error'), last_status_change: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Generate Concat List').item.json.project_id, topic_id: $('Generate Concat List').item.json.topic_id, stage: 'assembly', action: 'failed', details: { step: 'normalization', error: $json.stderr || $json.stdout || 'Unknown' } }) }}
